allow: Bash(bash -c 'until rm -rf .next 2>/dev/null && [ ! -e .next ]; do sleep 2; done && echo "cleaned"')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process node | Where-Object { \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine -like '\\''*royal-kebab*'\\'' } | Select-Object Id, @{Name='\\''Cmd'\\'';Expression={\(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}}')
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName")
